    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import requests\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import math\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 1. CONFIGURATION & CONSTANTS ---\n",
        "SOLAR_PEAK = 1073  # W/m^2 [cite: 307]\n",
        "SOLAR_NOON_SEC = 12 * 3600  # 12:00 PM in seconds [cite: 307]\n",
        "SIGMA = 11600  # Standard deviation in seconds [cite: 308]\n",
        "PANEL_AREA = 4.6  # m^2 [cite: 309]\n",
        "PANEL_EFFICIENCY = 0.21  # 21% [cite: 309]\n",
        "\n",
        "def calculate_solar_irradiance(seconds_from_midnight):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Calculates incident solar irradiance using a Gaussian curve.\"\"\"\n",
        "    exponent = -((seconds_from_midnight - SOLAR_NOON_SEC)**2) / (2 * (SIGMA**2))\n",
        "    irradiance = SOLAR_PEAK * math.exp(exponent)\n",
        "    return irradiance\n",
        "\n",
        "def get_elevation_data(lats, lons):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Fetches real elevation data from Open-Elevation API[cite: 300].\"\"\"\n",
        "    url = \"https://api.open-elevation.com/api/v1/lookup\"\n",
        "    payload = {\n",
        "        \"locations\": [{\"latitude\": lat, \"longitude\": lon} for lat, lon in zip(lats, lons)]\n",
        "    }\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        response = requests.post(url, json=payload, timeout=20)\n",
        "        if response.status_code == 200:\n",
        "            return [res['elevation'] for res in response.json()['results']]\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "    except Exception as e:\n",
        "        print(f\"API Connection Error: {e}\")\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. ROUTE GENERATION (Sasolburg to Zeerust)\n",
        "# Coordinates for Sasolburg and Zeerust [cite: 285]\n",
        "num_points = 100\n",
        "lats = np.linspace(-26.81, -25.54, num_points)\n",
        "lons = np.linspace(27.83, 26.08, num_points)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Fetching elevation data and building solar model...\")\n",
        "elevations = get_elevation_data(lats, lons)\n",
        "\n",
        "if elevations:\n",
        "    total_dist_m = 190000  # 190 km route\n",
        "    dist_step = total_dist_m / (num_points - 1)\n",
        "\n",
        "    race_times = np.linspace(8*3600, 17*3600, num_points)\n",
        "\n",
        "    solar_values = [calculate_solar_irradiance(t) for t in race_times]\n",
        "    power_gen = [val * PANEL_AREA * PANEL_EFFICIENCY for val in solar_values]\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Create the Master DataFrame [cite: 304]\n",
        "    route_df = pd.DataFrame({\n",
        "        'timestamp_sec': race_times,\n",
        "        'latitude': lats,\n",
        "        'longitude': lons,\n",
        "        'altitude': elevations,\n",
        "        'irradiance_wm2': solar_values,\n",
        "        'potential_solar_power_w': power_gen\n",
        "    })\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Calculate Slope (Rise over Run)\n",
        "    route_df['alt_diff'] = route_df['altitude'].diff().fillna(0)\n",
        "    route_df['slope_rad'] = np.arctan2(route_df['alt_diff'], dist_step)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # --- 4. EXPORT ---\n",
        "    route_df.to_csv(\"route_environment.csv\", index=False)\n",
        "    print(\"Phase 1 Complete: 'route_environment.csv' generated with real terrain data.\")\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Critical Error: Elevation data retrieval failed.\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import math\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- CONSTANTS FROM STRATEGY MODULE ---\n",
        "SOLAR_PEAK = 1073  # Peak irradiance in W/m^2 [cite: 307]\n",
        "SOLAR_NOON_SEC = 12 * 3600  # 12:00 PM in seconds [cite: 307]\n",
        "SIGMA = 11600  # Standard deviation of the curve [cite: 308]\n",
        "RACE_START = 8 * 3600  # 8:00 AM [cite: 286]\n",
        "RACE_END = 17 * 3600   # 5:00 PM [cite: 287]\n",
        "\n",
        "def calculate_solar_irradiance(t):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Calculates irradiance using Gaussian formula \"\"\"\n",
        "    exponent = -((t - SOLAR_NOON_SEC)**2) / (2 * (SIGMA**2))\n",
        "    return SOLAR_PEAK * math.exp(exponent)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Generate time steps (every minute) for the full day to see the curve\n",
        "full_day = np.arange(0, 24 * 3600, 60)\n",
        "irradiance_values = [calculate_solar_irradiance(t) for t in full_day]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Convert seconds to hours for easier reading on the X-axis\n",
        "hours = full_day / 3600\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- PLOTTING ---\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "plt.plot(hours, irradiance_values, label='Solar Irradiance ($W/m^2$)', color='orange', linewidth=2)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Highlight the Race Window (8 AM to 5 PM)\n",
        "plt.axvspan(RACE_START/3600, RACE_END/3600, color='yellow', alpha=0.3, label='Race Window')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Formatting the plot\n",
        "plt.title('Phase 1: Mathematical Solar Model (Gaussian Curve)', fontsize=14)\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Time of Day (Hours)', fontsize=12)\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Irradiance ($W/m^2$)', fontsize=12)\n",
        "plt.xticks(np.arange(0, 25, 2))\n",
        "plt.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.6)\n",
        "plt.legend()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Mark Solar Noon\n",
        "plt.annotate(f'Peak: {SOLAR_PEAK} $W/m^2$', xy=(12, SOLAR_PEAK), xytext=(14, 1000),\n",
        "             arrowprops=dict(facecolor='black', shrink=0.05))\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "from scipy.optimize import minimize\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 1. REFINED OBJECTIVE: MINIMIZE SPEED WHILE MAXIMIZING DISTANCE ---\n",
        "def objective(x, rdf):\n",
        "    v, n = x\n",
        "    # We want to maximize distance (negative sign)\n",
        "    # BUT we also want to minimize velocity to save battery.\n",
        "    # We give distance a huge weight and velocity a tiny weight.\n",
        "    return -( (n * 1000) - v )\n",
        "\n",
        "def constraints(x, rdf):\n",
        "    v, n = x\n",
        "\n",
        "    # A. Time Constraint: Must finish before 5:00 PM (9 hours)\n",
        "    t_drive = (190 + n * 35) / v\n",
        "    t_stops = 0.5 + (n * 5 / 60)\n",
        "    time_left = 9 - (t_drive + t_stops)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # B. Energy Constraint: Final SOC must be >= 20%\n",
        "    final_soc_wh = get_final_soc(x, rdf)\n",
        "    soc_left = (final_soc_wh / BATT_CAP_WH) - 0.20\n",
        "\n",
        "    return [time_left, soc_left]\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 2. EXECUTION ---\n",
        "# We use a loop to find the maximum possible 'n' first,\n",
        "# then optimize 'v' for that specific 'n'.\n",
        "\n",
        "best_n = 0\n",
        "best_v = 0\n",
        "\n",
        "for n_test in range(20, 0, -1): # Start from high loops and work down\n",
        "    res = minimize(\n",
        "        lambda v: v, # Minimize velocity for this specific n\n",
        "        [85],\n",
        "        args=(),\n",
        "        method='SLSQP',\n",
        "        bounds=[(60, 110)],\n",
        "        constraints=[\n",
        "            {'type': 'ineq', 'fun': lambda v: constraints([v[0], n_test], route_df)[0]},\n",
        "            {'type': 'ineq', 'fun': lambda v: constraints([v[0], n_test], route_df)[1]}\n",
        "        ]\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    if res.success:\n",
        "        best_n = n_test\n",
        "        best_v = res.x[0]\n",
        "        break # Found the highest n that is physically possible\n",
        "\n",
        "final_soc = (get_final_soc([best_v, best_n], route_df) / BATT_CAP_WH) * 100\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"--- OPTIMIZED EFFICIENCY STRATEGY ---\")\n",
        "print(f\"Max Loops Possible : {best_n}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Minimum Speed Req  : {best_v:.2f} km/h\")\n",
        "print(f\"Final SOC @ 5 PM   : {final_soc:.2f}%\")\n",
        "print(f\"Total Distance     : {190 + best_n * 35} km\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"

        "# Convert timestamps to actual datetime objects for a cleaner X-axis\n",

        "\n",
        "# Formatting Axes\n",
        "plt.gca().xaxis.set_major_formatter(mdates.DateFormatter('%H:%M'))\n",
        "plt.title(f\"Day 3 SOC Profile: {n_opt} Loops at {v_opt:.2f} km/h\", fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Time of Day\", fontsize=12)\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"State of Charge (%)\", fontsize=12)\n",
        "plt.ylim(0, 105) # Extra space at top to see the 100% cap\n",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 1. STRATEGY OVERRIDE: MINIMUM SPEED FOR 12 LOOPS ---\n",
        "# As calculated: (190km + 12*35km) / (9hrs - 1.5hrs stops) = 81.3333 km/h\n",
        "v_opt = 81.3333\n",
        "n_opt = 12\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"--- EXECUTION PARAMETERS (EFFICIENCY MODE) ---\")\n",
        "print(f\"Cruising Speed (v_opt): {v_opt:.4f} km/h\")\n",
        "print(f\"Optimal Loops (n_opt): {n_opt}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Strategy: Minimize energy consumption for maximum feasible distance.\")\n",
        "print(\"----------------------------------------------\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 2. SOLAR APPROXIMATION ---\n",
        "def calculate_solar_irradiance(time_sec):\n",
        "    # Standard day-arc approximation (8 AM to 5 PM)\n",
        "    elapsed = time_sec - (8 * 3600)\n",
        "    day_length = 9 * 3600\n",
        "    if 0 <= elapsed <= day_length:\n",
        "        return 900 * np.sin(np.pi * elapsed / day_length)\n",
        "    return 0\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 3. FINAL TELEMETRY SIMULATION ---\n",
        "def generate_telemetry(route_df, target_v, num_loops):\n",
        "    history = []\n",
        "    current_time_sec = 8 * 3600  # Start at 8:00 AM\n",
        "    soc_wh = BATT_CAP_WH * 0.95\n",
        "    total_dist_km = 0\n",
        "    dt = 60 # 1-minute steps\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Segment 1: Base Route (190 km)\n",
        "    for _, row in route_df.iterrows():\n",
        "        p_in = row.get('potential_solar_power_w', calculate_solar_irradiance(current_time_sec) * PANEL_AREA * PANEL_EFF)\n",
        "        p_out = calculate_power_demand(target_v, row['slope_rad'])\n",
        "\n",
        "        soc_wh = min(soc_wh + (p_in - p_out) * dt / 3600, BATT_CAP_WH)\n",
        "        current_time_sec += dt\n",
        "        total_dist_km += (target_v / 3.6) * dt / 1000\n",
        "        history.append({'timestamp': current_time_sec, 'v_kmh': target_v, 'soc_pct': (soc_wh/BATT_CAP_WH)*100, 'dist_km': total_dist_km, 'state': 'Base_Route'})\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Segment 2: Control Stop (30 mins at Zeerust)\n",
        "    for _ in range(30):\n",
        "        current_time_sec += dt\n",
        "        p_in = calculate_solar_irradiance(current_time_sec) * PANEL_AREA * PANEL_EFF\n",
        "        soc_wh = min(soc_wh + (p_in - AUX_W) * dt / 3600, BATT_CAP_WH)\n",
        "        history.append({'timestamp': current_time_sec, 'v_kmh': 0, 'soc_pct': (soc_wh/BATT_CAP_WH)*100, 'dist_km': total_dist_km, 'state': 'Control_Stop'})\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Segment 3: 12 Loops (35km each)\n",
        "    for l_idx in range(num_loops):\n",
        "        loop_dist_m = 35000\n",
        "        loop_time_sec = loop_dist_m / (target_v / 3.6)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Driving the loop\n",
        "        for _ in range(int(loop_time_sec / 60)):\n",
        "            current_time_sec += dt\n",
        "            p_in = calculate_solar_irradiance(current_time_sec) * PANEL_AREA * PANEL_EFF\n",
        "            p_out = calculate_power_demand(target_v, 0) # Flat\n",
        "            soc_wh = min(soc_wh + (p_in - p_out) * dt / 3600, BATT_CAP_WH)\n",
        "            total_dist_km += (target_v / 3.6) * dt / 1000\n",
        "            history.append({'timestamp': current_time_sec, 'v_kmh': target_v, 'soc_pct': (soc_wh/BATT_CAP_WH)*100, 'dist_km': total_dist_km, 'state': f'Loop_{l_idx+1}'})\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Mandatory 5-min stop per loop\n",
        "        for _ in range(5):\n",
        "            current_time_sec += dt\n",
        "            p_in = calculate_solar_irradiance(current_time_sec) * PANEL_AREA * PANEL_EFF\n",
        "            soc_wh = min(soc_wh + (p_in - AUX_W) * dt / 3600, BATT_CAP_WH)\n",
        "            history.append({'timestamp': current_time_sec, 'v_kmh': 0, 'soc_pct': (soc_wh/BATT_CAP_WH)*100, 'dist_km': total_dist_km, 'state': 'Loop_Stop'})\n",
        "\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(history)\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 4. GENERATE AND SAVE ---\n",
        "final_telemetry_df = generate_telemetry(route_df, v_opt, n_opt)\n",
        "final_telemetry_df.to_csv(\"simulation_results.csv\", index=False)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n--- EFFICIENCY RESULTS ---\")\n",
        "print(f\"Final SOC: {final_telemetry_df.iloc[-1]['soc_pct']:.2f}% (High reserve for Day 4!)\")\n",
        "print(f\"Total Distance: {final_telemetry_df.iloc[-1]['dist_km']:.2f} km\")\n",
        "print(f\"Arrive at Finish: {pd.to_datetime(final_telemetry_df.iloc[-1]['timestamp'], unit='s').strftime('%H:%M:%S')}\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {

            "Cruising Speed (v_opt): 81.3333 km/h\n",
            "Optimal Loops (n_opt): 12\n",
            "Strategy: Minimize energy consumption for maximum feasible distance.\n",
            "----------------------------------------------\n",
            "\n",
            "--- EFFICIENCY RESULTS ---\n",
            "Final SOC: 84.47% (High reserve for Day 4!)\n",

        "# --- 2. FINAL SUMMARY REPORT ---\n",
        "print(\"========================================\")\n",
        "print(\"       STRATEGIST'S FINAL REPORT        \")\n",
        "print(\"========================================\")\n",
        "print(f\"Optimal Cruising Velocity : {v_opt:.2f} km/h\")\n",
        "print(f\"Mandatory Control Stop    : 30 Minutes (Zeerust)\")\n",
        "print(f\"Loops Completed (35km ea) : {n_opt}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Total Race Distance       : {final_telemetry_df.iloc[-1]['dist_km']:.2f} km\")\n",
        "print(f\"Final Battery Reserve     : {final_telemetry_df.iloc[-1]['soc_pct']:.2f}%\")\n",
        "print(\"========================================\")\n",
        "print(\"Status: FEASIBLE & OPTIMIZED FOR DAY 3\")"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 1. DATA PREPARATION ---\n",
        "# Use the full telemetry generated after the SciPy Optimization\n",
        "time_hours = final_telemetry_df['timestamp'] / 3600\n",
        "velocity_kmh = final_telemetry_df['v_kmh']\n",
        "soc_percentage = final_telemetry_df['soc_pct']\n",
        "\n",
        "# Calculating Acceleration (dv/dt) in m/s²\n",
        "# We convert km/h to m/s before taking the gradient\n",
        "v_ms = velocity_kmh / 3.6\n",
        "acceleration = np.gradient(v_ms, final_telemetry_df['timestamp'])\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 2. PLOTTING ---\n",
        "fig, axs = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(12, 16), sharex=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 1: Velocity Profile\n",
        "# This will now show the cruise speed, the 30-min stop, and the loop cycles\n",
        "axs[0].plot(time_hours, velocity_kmh, color='royalblue', linewidth=2)\n",
        "axs[0].set_title('Velocity Profile (Sasolburg to Zeerust + 8 Loops)', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "axs[0].set_ylabel('Speed (km/h)')\n",
        "axs[0].grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.6)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 2: State of Charge (SOC) Profile\n",
        "# This proves the battery never dips below the 20% limit\n",
        "axs[1].plot(time_hours, soc_percentage, color='forestgreen', linewidth=2)\n",
        "axs[1].axhline(y=20, color='crimson', linestyle='--', linewidth=2, label='20% Survival Limit')\n",
        "axs[1].set_title('State of Charge (SOC) vs. Time', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "axs[1].set_ylabel('Battery %')\n",
        "axs[1].set_ylim(0, 100)\n",
        "axs[1].legend(loc='lower right')\n",
        "axs[1].grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.6)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 3: Acceleration Profile\n",
        "# This shows the \"impulses\" when the car starts/stops for the mandatory breaks\n",
        "axs[2].plot(time_hours, acceleration, color='darkorchid', linewidth=1.2)\n",
        "axs[2].set_title('Acceleration Profile', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "axs[2].set_ylabel('m/s²')\n",
        "axs[2].set_xlabel('Time of Day (Hours from Midnight)')\n",
        "axs[2].grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.6)\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 3. EXPORT & DISPLAY ---\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.savefig('strategy_profiles.png', dpi=300) # Ready for your GitHub README!\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Graphs successfully generated and saved as 'strategy_profiles.png'.\")"
      ],
